name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support of Rs. 6,000 per year to eligible farmer families, paid in three installments.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Collateral-free working capital loans for street vendors to restart or grow their business.

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: Financial support, skill training, and toolkits for traditional artisans and craftspeople.

name: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans up to Rs. 10 lakh for non-farm micro and small enterprises.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connections for women from below-poverty-line households.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the education and marriage expenses of a girl child.

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
description: Pension and financial assistance for elderly, widowed, and disabled persons from poor households.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed monthly pension scheme for workers in the unorganised sector after retirement.

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Provision of safe and adequate piped drinking water to every rural household.

name: Samagra Shiksha
description: Integrated scheme supporting school education from pre-school to senior secondary level.
